+{

+    "title": "longhorn: [FEATURE] Add metric for last backup of a volume",
+    "description": "[FEATURE] Add metric for last backup of a volume. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current longhorn deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your longhorn version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn\nhelm list -n longhorn 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working longhorn installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review longhorn configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant longhorn configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn\nkubectl get configmap -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=longhorn\n```\n## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe (👍 if you like this request)\n\nI am running the [`kube-prometheus-stack`](https://github.com/prometheus-community/helm-charts/tree/main/charts/kube-prometheus-stack) to monitor some"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [FEATURE] Add metric for last backup of a volume",
+        "description": "## Pre Ready-For-Testing Checklist\n\nThe reproduce steps/test steps are at:\n\nThe workaround is at:\n\nThe PR for the YAML change is at:\nThe PR for the chart change is at:\n\nThe PR is at https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn-manager/pull/4377\n\nArea metrics\nIssues\n\nThe LEP PR is at\n\nThe UI issue/PR is\n```yaml\n> kl get service\n    NAME                                       TYPE        CLUSTER-IP      EXTERNAL-IP   PORT(S)          AGE\n    longhorn-admission-webhook                 ClusterIP   10.43.191.158   <none>        9502/TCP         3h34m\n    longhorn-backend                           ClusterIP   10.43.192.15    <none>        9500/TCP         3h34m\n    longhorn-frontend                          ClusterIP   10.43.146.234   <none>        80/TCP           3h34m\n    longhorn-recovery-backend                  ClusterIP   10.43.233.131   <none>        9503/TCP         3h34m\n    longhorn-ui-nodeport \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn\nkubectl get events -n longhorn --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[FEATURE] Add metric for last backup of a volume\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Pre Ready-For-Testing Checklist\n\nThe reproduce steps/test steps are at:\n\nThe workaround is at:\n\nThe PR for the YAML change is at:\nThe PR for the chart change is at:\n\nThe PR is at https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn-manager/pull/4377\n\nArea metrics\nIssues\n\nThe LEP PR is at\n\nThe UI issue/PR is at\n\nThe documentation issue/PR is at https://github.com/longhorn/website/pull/1272\n\nThe automation",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "> kl get service\n    NAME                                       TYPE        CLUSTER-IP      EXTERNAL-IP   PORT(S)          AGE\n    longhorn-admission-webhook                 ClusterIP   10.43.191.158   <none>        9502/TCP         3h34m\n    longhorn-backend                           ClusterIP   10.43.192.15    <none>        9500/TCP         3h34m\n    longhorn-frontend                          ClusterIP   10.43.146.234   <none>        80/TCP           3h34m\n    longhorn-recovery-backend                  ClusterIP   10.43.233.131   <none>        9503/TCP         3h34m\n    longhorn-ui-nodeport                       NodePort    10.43.34.24     <none>        8000:30000/TCP   3h32m\n    pvc-7d4327b7-e816-4219-ab25-36d76ddd88c6   ClusterIP   10.43.195.223   <none>        2049/TCP         76m\n   ",
+        "> curl -sSL http://10.43.192.15:9500/metrics | grep longhorn_volume_last_backup_at\n    # HELP longhorn_volume_last_backup_at Unix timestamp of the last successful backup of this volume, or 0 if no such backup exists\n    # TYPE longhorn_volume_last_backup_at gauge\n    longhorn_volume_last_backup_at{node=\"ip-10-0-1-245\",pvc=\"www-web-state-rwx-v1-0\",pvc_namespace=\"default\",    volume=\"pvc-7d4327b7-e816-4219-ab25-36d76ddd88c6\"} 1.766991604e+09"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
